case_title: NORMA AGUILAR VS. LAURA LYNN LAND et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, NORMA AS TO DEFENDANT LAND, LAURA LYNN SILVA, ALFREDO DOES 1-10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-17-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-02-2006
BALANCE OF FEE PAID FOR TRANSACTION W1205A12F031 BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, NORMA
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-01-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-17-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-07-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE COMPLAINT ONLY
